title: carlina biebersteinii subsp. biebersteinii
intro: Carlina biebersteinii subsp. biebersteinii, also known as the Carline Thistle or Bieberstein's Carline Thistle, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its tall, prickly stems and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carlina biebersteinii subsp. biebersteinii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
